lesson: A wedge with an inclination of angle θ rests next to a wall. A sphere of mass m is sliding down the incline surface, as shown. There is no friction between any of the surfaces (wedge and the sphere, wedge and the horizontal surface, wedge and the wall). Take g = 9.8 m/s^2. (a) Find Ftotal, the magnitude of the sum of all forces acting on the sphere. (b) Find Fww, the magnitude of the force exerted by the wall on the wedge.
